summary: Section 2.1 has already been rewritten to fix all curmudgeon-identified issues. The old arithmetic errors (H(15000)=1270km should be 1498km; ~22Hz from averaging pole/equatorial heights) are gone — the section no longer uses r=15000 or naive averaging. Current structure: (1) supremum impossibility (H(r)<=8537, so 9572 and 9086 impossible), (2) monotonicity proof (f_QW>=8.77Hz everywhere, 7.83Hz impossible), (3) formula-switching critique, (4) Q-factor (~4-6 vs >>100 for rigid dome), (5) post-hoc radius selection, (6) supplementary rigorous averages (3316km->22.6Hz, 2140km->35Hz). All numbers independently verified. Only minor remaining issue: duplicate style attribute on h2 tag (cosmetic).
